name: Listing Rules Template Details
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/784-listing-rules-templates-overview", "children": [{"text": "Listing rules templates"}]}, {"text": " contain all the settings to list products to eBay and make it quick and easy to apply the same settings to many products."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The first tab of a rules template is the "}, {"text": "Template Details", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Here you give the template a name, ans select the account it will list to. To set up your rules\u00a0template details:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your\u00a0Neto by Maropost control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Listing rule templates", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the template you're working on or click the "}, {"text": "Add new", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to create a new template."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image1]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the "}, {"text": "Template Details", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab, enter a "}, {"text": "Template name", "bold": true}, {"text": ". We recommend describing the shipping calculation method/costs and if the template is for variations or standard listings."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select an "}, {"text": "eBay Store / Account", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": You won't be able to save the template until you've set default categories on the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/786-ebay-categorisation-listing-rules", "children": [{"text": "Categorisation & Listing Rules"}]}, {"text": " tab."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Tip", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Set up the next tab of your listing rules template, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/786-ebay-categorisation-listing-rules#category=Support__c:Launch_eBay_Store__c", "children": [{"text": "eBay Categorisation & Listing Rules"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]
